title: Chapter 6 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 6 concepts!

questions.question: Lists in Dart are based on an index starting at:
questions.explanation: Indexes always begin calculating from offset 0.

questions.question: What collection uses explicit Key-Value associations rather than a numerical sequence?
questions.explanation: Maps correlate explicit Keys to assigned Values.

questions.question: To add an item to the end of a List `nums`, you call nums._____(item).
questions.explanation: The add() method is used to push to the array trailing end.
